cli_commands.name: init
cli_commands.purpose: initialize SUDD in a project directory

cli_commands.name: status
cli_commands.purpose: show SUDD installation status (--all-siblings)

cli_commands.name: update
cli_commands.purpose: update SUDD framework files (--all-siblings)

cli_commands.name: setup
cli_commands.purpose: configure global SUDD settings

cli_commands.name: auto
cli_commands.purpose: fully autonomous mode — process all queued changes (+92 lines this cycle: inline stats persistence + deferred finalize for mid-session crash survival)

cli_commands.name: audit
cli_commands.purpose: platform-wide persona audit

cli_commands.name: metrics
cli_commands.purpose: derived metrics from git + archive

cli_commands.name: doctor
cli_commands.purpose: preflight checks — fail loud before sudd auto

cli_commands.name: diagnose
cli_commands.purpose: fleet-level health: integrity, contracts, tier drift

cli_commands.name: heal
cli_commands.purpose: repair wiped/degraded SUDD files from embedded templates

cli_commands.name: fleet
cli_commands.purpose: fleet status/update helpers for multi-project rollups

cli_commands.name: triage
cli_commands.purpose: interactive TUI batch review of ported inbox

cli_commands.name: promote
cli_commands.purpose: promote inbox change to active with allocated id

cli_commands.name: list-snapshots
cli_commands.purpose: list pre-update snapshots

cli_commands.name: restore-snapshot
cli_commands.purpose: restore framework files from a snapshot

cli_commands.name: learn
cli_commands.purpose: manage learning (patterns, lessons, cross-repo sync)

cli_commands.name: learn status
cli_commands.purpose: show learning statistics

cli_commands.name: learn sync
cli_commands.purpose: export local patterns to ~/.sudd/learning/

cli_commands.name: learn import
cli_commands.purpose: import global patterns into local patterns.md

cli_commands.name: learn promote
cli_commands.purpose: manually run pattern promotion scan

cli_commands.name: learn mine
cli_commands.purpose: index SUDD memory into MemPalace

cli_commands.name: vision
cli_commands.purpose: inspect sudd/vision.md (North Star + Current Path)

cli_commands.name: vision context
cli_commands.purpose: print planning context (North Star + last 5 path entries) for /sudd-new and /sudd-chat

cli_commands.name: state
cli_commands.purpose: print sudd/CURRENT_STATE.md; --refresh regenerates (filesystem-truth TL;DR), --no-llm cheap regen

database.notes: No DB. State lives in JSON/markdown files on disk (filesystem-only persistence).

models.name: State
models.purpose: orchestrator state — mode/phase/active change/retries/discovery/audit counters + stats rollup (auto_session outcomes by tier and by check). +54 lines this cycle: inline persistence on every change instead of just at end-of-session so crashes don't lose stats.

models.name: PreArchiveCheck
models.purpose: registry of pre-archive structural assertions; AppliesTo bitmask (OutcomeDone|OutcomeStuck) controls per-outcome filtering

models.name: FollowupReport
models.purpose: DONE_DIRTY outcome tier: shipped-but-hygiene-imperfect changes land in sudd/changes/dirty/{id}/ with FOLLOWUP.md (+ full spec set) listing failing checks + fix hints. 99 lines, 7 files now populated in sudd/changes/dirty/{id}/

models.name: VisionDoc
models.purpose: parse/write sudd/vision.md split (## North Star + ## Current Path); MigrateVisionMD idempotent migration

models.name: VisionExtract
models.purpose: extract planning context for /sudd-new and /sudd-chat injection

models.name: CurrentState
models.purpose: sudd/CURRENT_STATE.md rolling handoff doc model; TL;DR now anchored to filesystem truth (state.json + active dir) rather than LLM-regurgitated guess

models.name: CurrentStateRender
models.purpose: Markdown render of handoff doc; +136 lines this cycle for filesystem-truth anchoring

models.name: LearningPipeline
models.purpose: post-archive lesson extraction; +84 lines this cycle to rewrite lesson headings so [DONE]/[DONE_DIRTY]/[STUCK] matches the real archival outcome (no more lesson-heading drift)

models.name: StuckClassifier
models.purpose: classifyStuckReason → non-empty TimeoutReason on every STUCK; runner.go enforces this and no longer leaks subprocess stdout into STUCK_REPORT

models.name: TriageModel
models.purpose: Bubble Tea model for triage TUI

migrations.notes: No DB migrations. Schema evolution handled by state.schema.json + livesource/healing in installer. vision.md split handled by idempotent MigrateVisionMD.

state_files.role: orchestrator-state — top-level keys observed: active_change, architecture_reviewed, audit, auto_session, autonomy, design_gate_passed/score, discovery, gate_passed/score, imported_from, last_command, last_run, mode, personas_validated, phase, retry_count, stats{stats_seeded,tasks_blocked,tasks_completed,tasks_stuck,total_done_dirty,total_retries}, tests_passed, version, vision_last_processed_at
central-configuration (cli, tiers, agents, escalation, discovery, audit, auto, learning, browser_use)

auth.notes: CLI tool run locally; no auth surface. API keys read from env by subprocess companions only.

test_inventory.ci_notes: No .github/workflows/ directory detected. Tests run locally via `go test ./...` or `make test`.

dependency_health.notes: Unchanged from prior manifest. Small, focused dependency tree. Python companion (persona-browser-agent) is optional runtime — not a compile dep.

code_quality.log_statements_note: fmt.Print*/log.* calls in Go (non-test). Up from 538 prior. Minor drift from runner.go hardening + auto.go inline-stats logging.

quality_signals_from_recent_lessons: Pure-function helpers (renderPreArchiveSection, classifyStuckReason) test as substring assertions — preferred pattern (lessons 2026-04-19)
Always emit section markers even when empty — missing section confused with 'feature disabled' (from discovered_audit_prearchive-checks-in-report_01)
Never plumb new counters through RunChange if the data already exists on ChangeResult — reuse, don't re-thread (from prearchive-checks-in-report lesson)
Filesystem is the source of truth for state invariants; LLM-regurgitated summaries drift (from current-state-tldr-filesystem-truth)
Lesson headings must match archival outcome ([DONE] / [DONE_DIRTY] / [STUCK]) — enforced by learning.go rewrite step (from lesson-heading-matches-outcome)
Enforce non-empty TimeoutReason on every STUCK; never dump raw subprocess stdout into STUCK_REPORT (from runner-stuck-requires-reason)

be_to_external.calls: registered PreArchiveChecks filtered by AppliesTo bitmask (DONE vs STUCK)
writes FOLLOWUP.md + full spec set to sudd/changes/dirty/{id}/ when hygiene checks fail post-ship
renders pre-archive check failures section; never dumps raw subprocess stdout
extract lesson → rewrite heading so [DONE]/[DONE_DIRTY]/[STUCK] matches archival outcome
sweeps leftover sudd/changes/stuck/{id}/ when same {id} is archived DONE (archive-clears-zombie-stuck-dirs is currently STUCK — implementation attempted, hygiene checks blocked it)
vision.Divergence on North Star vs Current Path
reads embedded templates via go:embed + writes sudd/vision.md stub
iterates sibling projects under common root
read state.json + active dir → render CURRENT_STATE.md TL;DR from ground truth
LLM subprocess for Trajectory generation (opt-in; TL;DR no longer relies on LLM)

fully autonomous: queue → process → discovery → audit loop

framework_surface.escalation_strategy_from_CLAUDE_md: retries 0-1: free models → 2-3: +Sonnet validation → 4-5: Sonnet all → 6-7: Opus all → 8+: STUCK

delta_since_last.note: Intense SUDD-auto session: 5 discovered_audit changes attempted, 1 cleanly DONE (current-state-tldr-filesystem-truth), 1 DONE_DIRTY with populated FOLLOWUP landing (runner-stuck-requires-reason), 3 STUCK (archive-clears-zombie, lesson-heading-matches-outcome, stats-rollup-deadfield-fix). Cleanup sweep (7f574c4) reclassified 7 cosmetic-drift STUCKs as DONE_DIRTY archives. Go: 122→123 files (+1 auto_finalize_test.go), 28,682→30,471 lines (+1,789). Main Go surface hardened: runner.go STUCK reason enforcement, stuck.go refactor, auto.go inline-stats crash survival, learning.go heading-rewrite, state/render.go filesystem-truth TL;DR.
populated_state_files: sudd/changes/dirty/discovered_audit_runner-stuck-requires-reason_01/ — first populated DONE_DIRTY landing with FOLLOWUP.md + SUMMARY.md + full spec set (99-line FOLLOWUP.md)
top_3_themes: Runner reliability & STUCK honesty — enforce non-empty TimeoutReason on every STUCK path, stop leaking subprocess stdout into STUCK_REPORT. runner.go +124 lines, stuck.go refactored. Lessons: classification must always pick a known bucket (subprocess_error|budget_exceeded|retry_exhausted|stuck_from_filesystem)

Crash-survival for stats — auto.go now persists stats inline per change (not just at end of session) + defers finalize so a mid-session crash no longer voids accumulated counters. +92 lines auto.go + 214-line auto_finalize_test.go regression coverage

Filesystem as source-of-truth — CURRENT_STATE.md TL;DR anchored to state.json + active dir instead of LLM-regurgitated prose (state/render.go +136 lines, render_test.go +152). Lesson pipeline rewrites lesson headings to match archival outcome (learning.go +84 lines). Together these eliminate two recurring drift sources

notes.scope_adjustment: This repo is a CLI framework, not a web app. api_surface.backend_endpoints/frontend_routes/websocket/graphql are all empty BY DESIGN. The equivalent user-facing surface is cli_commands (Go Cobra) + ai_cli_skills (markdown /sudd:* slash commands in .claude/.opencode/.crush/). Data layer is filesystem-only (state.json, codebase-manifest.json, changes/, memory/). Auth is none — local CLI tool; API keys live in env for subprocess companions.
notes.transient_artifacts_excluded: sudd/codebase-manifest.json (this file), sudd/alignment-report.md, sudd/audit/screenshots/, browser-reports/, *_codeintel.json are regenerable and gitignored per CLAUDE.md.
notes.reliability_disclaimer: Structure/api_surface/auth sections are RELIABLE (static scan). data_layer/tests/dependency_health are BEST-EFFORT (some inference). code_quality/integration_map are SPECULATIVE (heuristic, expect some false positives/negatives).
notes.ground_truth_workflow_note: sudd/vision.md and sudd/CURRENT_STATE.md are Go-owned: the CLI agent reads them but never writes directly. Markdown commands must call `sudd vision context` / `sudd state` rather than parsing these files themselves. DONE_DIRTY outcome tier (v3.8.x) is now a first-class workflow state — sudd/changes/dirty/{id}/ is the landing zone for shipped-but-hygiene-imperfect changes and has its first populated instance (discovered_audit_runner-stuck-requires-reason_01). The 2026-04-20 reclassification sweep (commit 7f574c4) moved 7 cosmetic-drift STUCKs into _DONE_DIRTY archives, so the _DONE vs _DONE_DIRTY split (31 vs 7) is now the authoritative outcome record.
